notes: Bug fixes: progress bar can no longer stick on Starting; cull rejects occluded/empty frames; About links to the online Manual.
notes_mac: Overnight stability pass: 5 bug fixes verified by editing 240 real photos end to end (cancel now reports honestly during DNG conversion, accurate finish counts, steadier Mac meters, plus two crash/prompt guards). Includes Split sessions, Mac hardware stats, and the BETA badge.
